reviews.comment:
Excelente atención en playa y en el Shop..  Los sanitarios muy limpios..un lindo lugar para hacer una parada super recomendable...

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service on the beach and in the shop. The restrooms were very clean. A lovely place to stop, highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
No tenían combustible el viernes santo, nos maltrato un empleado q parecía q disfrutaba la situación. No vuelvo nunca mas

(Translated by Google)
They had no fuel on Good Friday, and we were mistreated by an employee who seemed to enjoy the situation. I'm never going back.

reviews.comment:
La atención regular y los baños muy sucios en mal estado .Y tenes que adivinar donde entrar no hay indicaciones.

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Súper bien la atención!
Los chicos unos genios!
Al servicio de la gente, dispuesto a ayudar.
En mi caso estoy viajando en moto el cual tuve un inconveniente y me ayudaron a resolverlo.
Unos genios.

Gracias por la atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!
The guys are fantastic!
Dedicated to serving people, always ready to help.
In my case, I was traveling by motorcycle and had a problem, and they helped me resolve it.
They're amazing.

Thank you for your help.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUR3NXZ5RXVBRRAB
